name: Chinese Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Red pepper, sliced thin (1/2 English cucumber, sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the snow peas. Place them in a bowl and pour in enough boiling water to cover. Let stand for 10 minutes, then drain and set aside.
2. Cook the noodles in plenty of boiling water for 3 to 4 minutes. Drain in a colander, rinse with cold water, and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, snow peas, red pepper, cucumber, shrimp, and crabmeat.
4. In a small bowl, combine ginger, garlic, sesame oil, black pepper, salt, vegetable oil, lemon juice, and red wine vinegar to make the dressing.
5. Pour the dressing over the ingredients in the large bowl and mix thoroughly.
6. Chill before serving.
